series_metadata.series_title: Surface Mine Industrial Minerals Permit File-Operational Documents
series_metadata.series_description: Surface mine permit is that permit issued on or after July 1, 1975 for the mining of industrial minerals (IM) (other than coal) pursuant to R.C. 1514, but incidental to coal. This file contains the records generally associated with the review of IM applications and field operations of each IM mine. Records include, but are not limited to: enforcement actions, including terminated Chief''s Orders, quarterly production reports, paid civil penalty assessments and their associated documentation, bond releases (except the final bond release retiring permit), bond receipts, bond invoices, photos (including slides, photographs and digital photos), modification and amendment maps, annual maps, groundwater modeling withdrawn applications, and production reports for incidental operations. Records are added throughout the life of the permit.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Electronic records retained until five years after expiration of the period during which the mining operation is active or is covered by any portion of a reclamation bond and then deleted. ; Paper: Paper records to be retained until five years after expiration of the period during which the mining operation is active or is covered by any portion of a reclamation bond and then shredded. If scanned and saved in an electronic format, the paper copy may be shredded at that time., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
